overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a dirt path through a dark forest at night. The character moves steadily through the woodland environment with swords visible on his back, surrounded by dense trees and undergrowth illuminated by moonlight.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with mixed birch and pine trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the winding dirt path, swords strapped to his back, moving through the moonlit forest

entered.detail: winding dirt trail illuminated by moonlight, cutting through the forest
white-barked deciduous trees lining the right side of the path
dense dark pine trees forming the forest wall on the left
tall grass and low vegetation flanking the trail edges

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a dark forest path at night, with Geralt walking away from the camera. White birch trees stand out on the right side against the dark coniferous forest on the left. The path winds gently through dense vegetation, with moonlight filtering through the canopy to illuminate the trail.

scene_state.functional_zone: denser forest section with curving path

events.description: path curves gently to the right as the character continues walking

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking along the trail, navigating the slight curve in the path as the forest becomes denser

entered.detail: thick cluster of evergreen trees creating a dark wall on the left side
dense bushes and low vegetation encroaching on the path edge

segments.scene_description: As Geralt progresses deeper into the woods, the birch trees fall behind and the forest becomes more enclosed with dense pine trees pressing in from the left. The path curves gently to the right, and the canopy thickens overhead, reducing sky visibility. The undergrowth becomes thicker and more prominent along the trail edges.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep forest trail with enclosed canopy

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the darkest section of the forest, surrounded by dense vegetation on all sides

entered.detail: thick wall of trees and bushes creating a tunnel-like effect around the path
tree branches extending over the path, partially obscuring the sky

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows Geralt walking through the most enclosed part of the forest, where the canopy is thick enough to block the sky entirely. Low-hanging branches extend over the path, and the vegetation forms dense walls on both sides. The path continues winding through the deep woods, with the character moving steadily into the darker forest depths.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a moonlit woodland that shifts from an open path lined with birch trees into a dense, enclosed pine forest. It begins with Geralt walking away from the camera along a winding dirt trail, where bright white birch trees on the right contrast with the dark coniferous woods on the left. As he progresses deeper into the woods, the birch trees gradually fall behind and the forest becomes more oppressive, with thick pine trees pressing in from the left. The scene then shifts as the path curves gently to the right, causing the overhead canopy to thicken and obscure the night sky. Finally, the environment grows more claustrophobic as the undergrowth becomes increasingly prominent along the edges of the narrowing trail.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Geralt ventures deeper into an increasingly oppressive and enclosed section of the forest. It begins with the character walking along a winding dirt path, where the surrounding vegetation starts to form dense, impenetrable walls on either side. As he progresses, the canopy thickens and lowers, gradually blocking out the moonlight and plunging the environment into deeper shadow. The scene then tightens further as low-hanging branches extend over the trail, finally enveloping the character in the most secluded and dark depths of the woodland.
